arts.ttl: Tottenham Transfer News: Spurs officially trigger Heung-min Son contract extension
arts.sum: Tottenham have officially exercised their one-year option in Heung-min Son's contract, the club have announced. The South Korean superstar would have been a free agent in the summer, but Tottenham have announced that they have used the option to prolong Son's time in north London until at least 2026.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Chelsea & Tottenham among PL suitors for star looking to sign pre-contract deal
arts.sum: Jonathan David is more likely to sign a pre-contract agreement ahead of a summer move than force a move in January, sources have told CaughtOffside. The Canada international is in the final six months of his deal at Lille and can speak to clubs outside of France about a transfer away from the Stade Pierre-Mauroy. arts.ttl: 'Yes absolutely' - 59-goal striker drops Liverpool transfer hint as he makes Arne Slot admission
arts.sum: Santiago Gimenez has admitted he would like to reunite with Liverpool head coach Arne Slot in the future

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold VERY CLOSE to joining Real Madrid NOW
arts.sum: Trent Alexander- Arnold is very close to immediately joining Real Madrid, according to reports in Spain. It is widely expected that Alexander-Arnold will join Madrid on a Bosman Transfer at the end of the season when his Liverpool contract expires.

arts.ttl: Kolo Muani to Tottenham transfer latest as Man Utd and Juventus rival bid
arts.sum: Speaking on his latest YouTube video, rounding up the latest Tottenham headlines, Gold said: "You have seen the links with PSG's Randal Kolo Muani, who is a player that Spurs have looked at. Last month, Luis Enrique hinted at his stance on Kolo Muani when he was quizzed on the PSG striker's lack of game time.

arts.ttl: Spurs team Postecoglou to pick vs Liverpool with Johnson and Kinsky debut calls

arts.ttl: Tottenham confirm Heung-min Son contract extension
arts.sum: The skipper’s contract extension has been triggered

arts.ttl: Tottenham 'common theme' highlighted as Ange Postecoglou sack pressure ramps up
arts.sum: Reader Bobbyspur says it's the wrong question: “For those that want Ange to be sacked, would love to know who you think we should bring in as a replacement? Tottenham fell to another defeat against visitors Newcastle United, compounding the pressure on manager Ange Postecoglou as their difficult start to the season continues.

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher pinpoints 'one thing that will stop Liverpool from winning the title'
arts.sum: Following Liverpool's 2-2 draw with Manchester United at Anfield on Sunday, Jamie Carragher has pinpointed the one thing that could end up costing Arne Slot's team the title this season
